scene.message: Yukino: What was that{nl} just now... A dream...?{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: I've had yet another{nl} precious experience...{waitkey}{ret}
Maki's Mother: Ugh...{nl} uhhh...{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: Ma'am!{nl} Are you okay?{waitkey}{ret}
Maki's Mother: Kandori's...{nl} men...{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Kandori!?{nl} The Kandori from SEBEC?{waitkey}{ret}
They appear to have{nl} lost consciousness.{waitkey}{ret}
